narrative:
Washington Twp township has 1,438 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
